primaryStudies.citation: Jastreboff AM, et al. Tirzepatide Once Weekly for the Treatment of Obesity. N Engl J Med. 2022;387(3):205-216.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: SURMOUNT-1: 15-21% weight loss at 72 weeks vs 3.1% placebo
primaryStudies.region: Global (US, Argentina, Brazil, China, India, Japan, Mexico, Russia, Taiwan)

primaryStudies.citation: Frias JP, et al. Tirzepatide versus Semaglutide in Type 2 Diabetes. N Engl J Med. 2021;385(6):503-515.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: SURPASS-2: Tirzepatide superior to semaglutide 1mg for HbA1c and weight

primaryStudies.citation: Willard FS, et al. Tirzepatide is an imbalanced and biased dual GIP and GLP-1 receptor agonist. JCI Insight. 2020;5(17):e140532.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: 5-fold greater GIPR vs GLP-1R potency; biased signaling reduces desensitization

primaryStudies.citation: Thomas MK, et al. Dual GIP and GLP-1 Receptor Agonist Tirzepatide Improves Beta-cell Function. J Clin Endocrinol Metab. 2021;106(2):388-396.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: 63% improvement in insulin sensitivity; benefits partly independent of weight loss

primaryStudies.citation: Rosenstock J, et al. SURPASS-1: Efficacy and safety of tirzepatide in type 2 diabetes. Lancet. 2021;398(10295):143-155.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: HbA1c reduction 1.87-2.07% vs placebo; 7-9.5kg weight loss

primaryStudies.citation: Garvey WT, et al. SURMOUNT-2: Tirzepatide in obesity with type 2 diabetes. Lancet. 2023;402(10402):613-626.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: 12.8-14.7% weight loss at 72 weeks; HbA1c reduced 2.1-2.4%

primaryStudies.citation: Karagiannis T, et al. Tirzepatide: dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor co-agonist. Cardiovasc Diabetol. 2022;21:169.
Zhao P, et al. Structural determinants of dual incretin receptor agonism by tirzepatide. PNAS. 2022;119(13):e2116506119.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: Cryo-EM reveals dual receptor activation mechanism; C20 fatty acid enables weekly dosing

primaryStudies.citation: Nicholls SJ, et al. Tirzepatide and Cardiovascular Outcomes in Patients with Type 2 Diabetes. N Engl J Med. 2025;392(1):65-76.
primaryStudies.population: Adults with T2D and high CV risk (N=13,299)
primaryStudies.keyFindings: SURPASS-CVOT: Noninferior to dulaglutide for MACE-3; 16% lower all-cause mortality
primaryStudies.region: Global (24 countries including US, Europe, Asia, Latin America)

primaryStudies.citation: Aronne LJ, et al. Tirzepatide vs Semaglutide for Weight Loss in Adults with Obesity. N Engl J Med. 2025;392(18):1743-1755.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: SURMOUNT-5: -20.2% vs -13.7% weight loss; superior to semaglutide at max doses

primaryStudies.citation: Packer M, et al. Tirzepatide in Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction and Obesity. N Engl J Med. 2024;391(23):2236-2247.
primaryStudies.keyFindings: SUMMIT: 38% reduction in CV death/worsening HF; KCCQ improvement

primaryStudies.citation: Malhotra A, et al. Tirzepatide for Moderate-to-Severe Obstructive Sleep Apnea. N Engl J Med. 2024;391(3):254-266.
primaryStudies.population: Adults with moderate-severe OSA and obesity (N=469)
primaryStudies.keyFindings: SURMOUNT-OSA: Significant AHI reduction; led to FDA approval for OSA

japaneseStudies.citation: Inagaki N, et al. Tirzepatide monotherapy and combination therapy in Japanese patients with type 2 diabetes (SURPASS J-mono). Lancet Diabetes Endocrinol. 2022;10(9):623-633.
japaneseStudies.keyFindings: SURPASS J-mono: HbA1c reduction 2.4-2.8%; superior to dulaglutide in Japanese population

japaneseStudies.citation: Kadowaki T, et al. Tirzepatide as an add-on to insulin in Japanese patients with T2D (SURPASS J-combo). Diabetes Obes Metab. 2022;24(11):2194-2204.
japaneseStudies.population: Japanese adults with T2D on insulin (N=443)
japaneseStudies.keyFindings: SURPASS J-combo: HbA1c reduction up to 2.9% when added to basal insulin

japaneseStudies.citation: Kawata T, et al. Pharmacokinetics and pharmacodynamics of tirzepatide in Japanese patients with type 2 diabetes. Clin Pharmacol Drug Dev. 2023;12(8):764-775.
japaneseStudies.keyFindings: Similar PK profile in Japanese patients; exposure-response supports same dosing across ethnicities

europeanStudies.citation: Ludvik B, et al. Once-weekly tirzepatide vs insulin degludec in T2D (SURPASS-3). Lancet. 2021;398(10300):583-598.
europeanStudies.keyFindings: SURPASS-3: Superior HbA1c and weight vs insulin degludec; EU sites included
europeanStudies.region: Global (17 countries including Austria, Germany, UK, Spain, Italy)

europeanStudies.citation: Del Prato S, et al. Tirzepatide vs insulin glargine in T2D (SURPASS-4). Lancet. 2021;398(10313):1811-1824.
europeanStudies.population: Adults with T2D and high CV risk (N=2,002)
europeanStudies.keyFindings: SURPASS-4: Superior to insulin glargine; CV safety signal; conducted across Europe
europeanStudies.region: Global (14 countries with major EU enrollment)

europeanStudies.citation: Drucker DJ, et al. Tirzepatide and the science of incretin mimetics: a European perspective. Lancet Diabetes Endocrinol. 2023;11(10):761-773.
europeanStudies.keyFindings: European expert review of tirzepatide mechanism and clinical evidence

europeanStudies.citation: Heerspink HJL, et al. Effects of tirzepatide on albuminuria in type 2 diabetes: pooled SURPASS analysis. Diabetes Care. 2023;46(5):1063-1069.
europeanStudies.keyFindings: 40% reduction in UACR across SURPASS trials; renal benefits

asianPacificStudies.citation: Gao L, et al. Tirzepatide in Chinese patients with type 2 diabetes: pharmacokinetics and safety. Diabetes Obes Metab. 2023;25(7):1851-1860.
asianPacificStudies.keyFindings: PK profile consistent with Western populations; supports same dosing in Chinese patients

asianPacificStudies.citation: Ji L, et al. Tirzepatide efficacy and safety in East Asian patients: subgroup analysis of SURPASS program. Diabetes Res Clin Pract. 2024;207:111075.
asianPacificStudies.population: East Asian participants from SURPASS trials
asianPacificStudies.keyFindings: Consistent efficacy in East Asian subgroup; similar safety profile to overall population

asianPacificStudies.citation: Yabe D, et al. Incretin-based therapies in Asian patients: focus on tirzepatide. J Diabetes Investig. 2023;14(6):721-732.
asianPacificStudies.keyFindings: Asian-specific considerations for tirzepatide use; lower BMI thresholds

asianPacificStudies.citation: Cho YM, et al. Tirzepatide in Korean patients with type 2 diabetes: post-hoc analysis. Endocrinol Metab. 2024;39(2):312-322.
asianPacificStudies.keyFindings: Tirzepatide effective in Korean T2D patients; HbA1c and weight outcomes consistent

asianPacificStudies.citation: Lee BW, et al. Real-world effectiveness of tirzepatide in Asian patients: systematic review. J Clin Med. 2024;13(12):3412.
asianPacificStudies.keyFindings: Real-world data supports trial findings in Asian populations

globalMetaAnalyses.citation: Patoulias D, et al. Tirzepatide vs GLP-1 receptor agonists: systematic review and meta-analysis. Diabetes Obes Metab. 2023;25(8):2179-2192.
globalMetaAnalyses.keyFindings: Tirzepatide superior to GLP-1RAs for HbA1c (-0.44%) and weight (-5.3kg)

globalMetaAnalyses.citation: Sattar N, et al. Tirzepatide cardiovascular event reduction: meta-analysis of Phase 3 trials. Lancet Diabetes Endocrinol. 2024;12(2):129-138.
globalMetaAnalyses.keyFindings: Pooled MACE reduction across 5 Phase 3 trials; supports CV benefit

globalMetaAnalyses.citation: Shi Q, et al. Tirzepatide efficacy across BMI subgroups: pooled analysis. Obesity. 2024;32(3):512-524.
globalMetaAnalyses.keyFindings: Consistent weight loss across all BMI categories; greater absolute loss at higher BMI

globalMetaAnalyses.citation: Rubino DM, et al. Effect of tirzepatide on body composition: pooled analysis. Lancet Diabetes Endocrinol. 2024;12(4):269-279.
globalMetaAnalyses.keyFindings: ~33% of weight loss from lean mass; improved metabolic health parameters

regulatoryDossiers.citation: European Medicines Agency. Mounjaro EPAR Public Assessment Report. EMA/CHMP/432085/2022.
regulatoryDossiers.keyFindings: EMA approval based on SURPASS 1-5; positive benefit-risk for T2D

regulatoryDossiers.citation: European Medicines Agency. Mounjaro Type II Variation Assessment: Weight Management. EMA/CHMP/2023.
regulatoryDossiers.keyFindings: EMA extension for weight management based on SURMOUNT program

regulatoryDossiers.citation: Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Agency Japan. Mounjaro Review Report. PMDA/2022.
regulatoryDossiers.keyFindings: Japanese approval based on SURPASS J-mono and J-combo; bridging studies

regulatoryDossiers.citation: Health Canada. Mounjaro Product Monograph. HC/2022.
regulatoryDossiers.keyFindings: Canadian approval for T2D; consistent with FDA/EMA assessments

regulatoryDossiers.citation: Therapeutic Goods Administration Australia. Mounjaro Australian Public Assessment Report. TGA/2023.
regulatoryDossiers.keyFindings: TGA approval for T2D and weight management

mechanismStudies.citation: Samms RJ, et al. GIPR agonism enhances TZP-induced weight loss via adipose tissue mechanisms. Cell Metab. 2024;36(1):189-203.
mechanismStudies.keyFindings: GIP receptor activation in adipose tissue critical for enhanced weight loss vs GLP-1 alone

mechanismStudies.citation: Campbell JE, et al. Tirzepatide signaling at human receptors. Mol Metab. 2023;68:101673.
mechanismStudies.keyFindings: Biased agonism profile characterized in human cell systems

mechanismStudies.citation: Finan B, et al. Reappraisal of GIP pharmacology for metabolic diseases. Trends Mol Med. 2024;30(1):54-67.
mechanismStudies.keyFindings: GIP biology update supporting tirzepatide mechanism; resolves historical paradoxes

realWorldEvidence.citation: Misra A, et al. Tirzepatide in Indian patients with T2D: real-world observational study. Diabetes Metab Syndr. 2024;18(3):102987.
realWorldEvidence.keyFindings: Real-world HbA1c reduction 2.1%; weight loss 8.2kg at 6 months

realWorldEvidence.citation: Fadini GP, et al. Early real-world experience with tirzepatide in Italy. Nutr Metab Cardiovasc Dis. 2024;34(2):456-463.
realWorldEvidence.keyFindings: Real-world effectiveness confirms trial results; GI tolerability acceptable

realWorldEvidence.citation: Khunti K, et al. Tirzepatide in UK clinical practice: early outcomes. Diabet Med. 2024;41(5):e15312.
realWorldEvidence.keyFindings: UK real-world data: HbA1c -1.9%; weight -7.8kg at 6 months

realWorldEvidence.citation: Wharton S, et al. Canadian real-world tirzepatide outcomes. Can J Diabetes. 2024;48(4):298-305.
realWorldEvidence.keyFindings: Canadian RWE supports efficacy across diverse populations

trials.title: SURPASS-3
regions: 17 countries including Austria, Germany, UK, Spain, Italy

evidenceSummary.regulatoryStatus: FDA/EMA/PMDA/TGA/Health Canada approved for T2D (2022) and obesity (2023); FDA approved for OSA (2024)
evidenceSummary.globalCoverage: Clinical trials conducted in 30+ countries across North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and Latin America
